name: How much does a NYC AI privilege lawyer cost?
description: Contingency often no upfront; 1/3 recovery typical.[4]

mainEntity.name: How much does a NYC AI privilege lawyer cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contingency often no upfront; 1/3 recovery typical.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description:
$300-800/hr or contingency for PI; consult free.[4] NY AI-savvy specialists higher.

**Key factors:**
- Flat fee discovery fights.
- Contingency 33-40%.
- Retainer $5k+.

Shop consults; value > cost. Nationwide similar.[4] Budget for experts.
